args.text: Environment confirmed at the new build.

args.subject: Checkout v9.2.0: rollout complete
args.body:
Checkout v9.2.0 has been successfully rolled out across all three environments:

1. checkout-staging - verified
2. checkout-eu - verified
3. checkout-us - verified

All smoke checklist items passed in each environment. Rollout is complete.

args.comment: All three environments verified and rollout-complete email sent
